name: Venture Rewards Credit Card
perks: 5x miles on hotels and rental cars booked via Capital One Travel
75,000 mile bonus after spending $4,000 in first 3 months
Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee credit (up to $120 every 4 years)
Miles transfer to 15+ travel loyalty programs
Travel accident insurance and 24-hour travel assistance
drawbacks: Capital One Travel portal locks in best 5x rate
Miles worth 1 cent each for statement credits (less than some competitors)
